core_mechanism: reduction of the governing static equations to a geometric area-minimization (minimal-surface / Plateau) variational problem, i.e. solving for hypersurfaces of vanishing mean curvature as critical points of an area functional
brief_reason: The abstract states the static equation is equivalent to vanishing extrinsic mean curvature and that the non-trivial solutions are obtained from minimal surfaces as solutions of the Plateau problem.
